name: BUCHE GUS STOP LOWER BRULE
source_address: 32615 MEDICINE BULL MEMORIAL HWY, Lower Brule

violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Containers of raw chicken were being stored above packages of raw pork and beef in the walk-in cooler.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand sink in the back prep area had used wiping clothes and ice in it.
